title: SQL: server crash on date typecast
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE event_date = CURRENT_DATE();
SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE event_date = '2004-05-25' OR event_date IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date BETWEEN '2004-01-01' AND '2004-12-31';
key_bug_features: server crash on date typecast comparison
